narrative:
Washington County has 41,074 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.6% of registrants.
